title: Frontend Figma, OpportunityListing e comunidade LOCAL_ONLY integrados

artifacts.reference: 96 passed in PostgreSQL 16 with separate owner/runtime; 20 passed in Vitest; Vite production build and deep-link check passed
0019_community_completion is the single local Alembic head after empty-database upgrade
/tmp/bluejet-phase8: desktop and 390px mobile screenshots; 0 console errors; 0 page errors; no horizontal page overflow

positive_results: PostgreSQL 16 empty-database upgrade reached 0019_community_completion as the only head.
Runtime login inherited bluejet_runtime without ownership, schema CREATE, DELETE or TRUNCATE privileges.
API suite completed with 96 passed and no skips or failures.
Frontend suite completed with 20 passed; production build and deep-link fallback succeeded.
Playwright exercised composer, four-step wizard, listing, detail and mobile rendering with zero console/page errors.
OpportunityListing response remained remunerated=false and created no assignment, funding, obligation or payout.
Media remained explicitly disabled and no upload or Storage endpoint was called.
limitations: Self-verified evidence in a dirty workspace does not satisfy S3 acceptance.
No relay was contacted, no NIP-07 signature was requested for posting and no public Nostr event was published.
No Lightning adapter or Storage provider was called.
Migration 0019 has not been authorized or applied in Supabase staging.
The Figma has no canonical mobile frames for these nodes; mobile validation preserves hierarchy using repository breakpoints.
Trends has no backend endpoint and therefore renders an explicit empty state.
